tagline: Set up remote access from your phone.
longDescription:
Walks you through enabling remote access to DestinCode from your phone (or any other device) in one conversation. Installs Tailscale if you don't have it, runs the auth flow, sets a remote-access password, and confirms everything works — explained in plain language for non-technical users, with no "open a terminal and run this" handoffs. Claude does the work; you just sign in to Tailscale when the browser pops up.

By the end you'll have DestinCode reachable at a stable Tailscale URL on any device on your tailnet, which means full chat + terminal access from your phone over an encrypted WireGuard tunnel. Idempotent — safe to re-run if you want to change the password or move to a new device.
